metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for workflow optimization — efficiency auditing, hook diagnosis & repair.

plugins.name: hook-doctor
plugins.description: Inspects and repairs Claude Code hook configurations. Detects 7 common misconfigurations and applies safe, idempotent fixes.

plugins.name: efficiency-audit
plugins.description: Analyzes Claude Code conversation transcripts to surface recurring inefficiencies and generate fix recommendations via heuristic rule engine.
